category_sources: source_facts.description says it logs in and retrieves AWS temporary credentials using a SAML IDP; official README describes exchanging SAML assertions for AWS STS temporary credentials.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is saml2aws; official GitHub README heading uses saml2aws.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, configuration, and advanced configuration; repository includes official provider docs under doc/provider.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Versent/saml2aws; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies AWS temporary credentials and SAML IDP; official README lists supported identity providers and AWS STS credential flow.
